entities.name: Contract Duration
entities.context: Natural bounding mechanism for package design even when other dimensions feel generous

entities.name: Packages
entities.context: Product offering structures that balance JDs, seats, and duration

entities.name: JDs
entities.context: Job Descriptions as a dimension that can be capped in packages

entities.name: Seats
entities.context: User/license dimension in package design, can be flexible or capped

entities.name: Pilots
entities.context: Shorter-term offerings for situations with highly uncertain volume

entities.name: Overage Behaviors
entities.context: Clearly specified handling of usage beyond package limits, alternative to silent unlimited usage

relationships.context: Duration serves as natural bounding mechanism for packages
JDs are a cappable dimension within packages
Seats are a flexible dimension within packages
Pilots are a package variant for uncertain volume scenarios
Overage specifications should be included in packages
